candidates.title: Photo Restoration for A4 Prints
candidates.brief: I need several old photo scans restored for A4 printing to mount on my wall. Restoration is needed due to: - Color fading - Scratches or tears - Blurriness The main focus should be on improving overall clarity. Ideal skills and experience: - Proficiency in photo editing software like Photoshop - Experience with photo restoration techniques - Attention to detail - Ability to work with a variety of damage types

candidates.title: Old Picture Restoration
candidates.brief: I need a physical photo restored. This is a personal keepsake and means a lot to me. Requirements: - Restore colors, details, and sharpness. - Must be able to work from a physical photo. Ideal Skills and Experience: - Expertise in photo restoration. - Experience with color correction and detail enhancement. - Ability to handle and restore physical photographs. Please provide examples of previous work.

candidates.title: AI Image Restoration Specialist Needed for Vintage Film Poster Text Repair
candidates.brief: We are seeking a detail-oriented freelancer with experience in AI image editing and typography restoration to help repair text on vintage film posters. The project involves working from images of old film posters where portions of letters or words have been damaged, faded, torn away, or otherwise removed. The goal is to use AI-assisted image editing tools to reconstruct the missing text so that it seamlessly matches the original visible lettering, including: -Font style -Letter shape and spacing -Texture and aging -Color and print quality -Overall visual consistency with the poster You will be provided with high-resolution images of posters. The restored text should look natural and historically accurate, blending invisibly with the surrounding artwork. Requirements: -Experience with AI image editing/restoration tools -Strong typography and graphic design skills -Familiarity with vintage

candidates.title: Logo design for car diagnostics automotive shop
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price # Automotive Diagnostic Brand – Logo & Icon Redesign (European Technical Ecommerce Brand) We are looking for a professional logo / brand identity designer to redesign and modernize the visual identity of our automotive diagnostic ecommerce brand: Cartline. IMPORTANT: This is NOT a generic car garage logo project. We are an EU-based ecommerce/distribution business specialized in: * automotive diagnostic tools * coding devices * workshop scan tools * professional vehicle diagnostics * mobile diagnostic ecosystems Brands/products sold include: OBDeleven, TOPDON, Carista, MBito and similar automotive diagnostic equipment. Our websites are evolving toward a premium European automotive-tech direction and the current logo/icon quality became the weakest point of the entire brand experience. candidates.title: Audio Sync Repair Editor Needed: Long-Form Interview Single Track (Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve)
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price I'm the host and executive producer of a late night political talk show on YouTube with 138,000+ subscribers. I have a 2 hour 43 minute recorded interview from Zoom that has multiple audio sync failures throughout the recording. This is not a single drift issue. The audio jumps out of sync at various unpredictable points across the entire timeline, requiring a methodical repair approach from start to finish. **This is a time-sensitive project. I need it turned around fast. Do not apply if you cannot commit to a rapid turnaround.** **What the Job Requires** - Import the single Zoom recording into Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve - This is one continuous video track with one audio track. There is no multicam, no camera cuts, no complex timeline work. - Screen the full 2 hour 43 minute recording to identify every point where the audio falls out of sync with the video - A
